upasargachandrika.example_text: 'idamidamiti tatra tatra tattat svaparamatErgahana pratarkayadBiH' (BA॰SAM॰179.35) pratarkadBirvivfRvadBiH
'kiM nu svidetat patatIti sarve vitarkayantaH parimohitAH smaH' (BA0 )
'manoraTEScEva tu cintayAmi taTEva budDyA paritarkayAmi' (rA0 53018) dAkziRAtyAstu manoraTaH syAditi cintayAmi taTApi budDyApi vitarkayAmi ityevaM 53213 ityatra paWanti
'na hyahaM taM kapiM manye karmaRA paritarkayan' (rA0 5466) rAvaRasyoktirezA paritarkayan anumimAnaH UhamAnaH juza paritarkaRe iti DAtupAWaH paritarkaRamUho hiMsA veti dIkzitaH
'kaccinna tarkayuktA vA ye cApyaparitarkitAH tvayA vA tava vA'mAtyE rbADyante tAta mAnavAH' (rA0 gore0 210916).. aparitarkitA nyAyato'parIkzitAH
